{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Yerin’s Forger technique
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s [[Forger technique]] is an invisible blade left in a doorframe.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
